final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing marketing poster for brand "RAN QIU", a lifestyle brand embodying Eastern aesthetics and natural poetry.

Style/medium: minimalist editorial poster design, Eastern aesthetic sensibility, natural poetic mood, warm healing visual language
Composition: generous negative space as dominant element, shallow depth of field effect, centered brand mark placement, balanced asymmetry
Subject: brand wordmark "RAN QIU" as primary focal element, subtle natural motifs (dried grass, fallen leaves, or seed pods) as secondary accents
Scene/backdrop: warm autumn atmosphere, golden hour lighting, soft blurred natural background suggesting late afternoon forest edge or meadow
Lighting/mood: golden hour sunlight, warm and diffused, soft directional light from low angle, serene and contemplative mood
Color palette: dominant #E8DCCB (beige) as base, #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red) as anchor accent, #D4A574 (golden brown) as highlight, harmonious warm earth tones
Materials/textures: matte paper texture, soft natural grain, subtle organic imperfections
Text (verbatim): "RAN QIU"
Constraints: must maintain readability of brand mark; generous留白 (negative space) must dominate composition; warm治愈 tone must be immediately apparent
Avoid: cluttered layout, harsh shadows, cool color temperatures, neon accents, over-saturated colors, generic stock photo aesthetic, Behance trendy gradients
